title: Panchakshari

title: Kathanayakudu
desc: A simple barber, Balu and his his childhood friend Ashok Kumar, now a renowned actor, face the complexities of their past friendship when a film shoot in their village reignites old connections.

title: Naa Peru Surya Na Illu India
desc: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Robinhood
desc: A fearless vigilante steals from the corrupt to help the poor, becoming a symbol of justice and rebellion in a system ruled by greed, deceit, and power-hungry elites.

title: Pandaga Chesko
desc: Karthik, a businessman, gets married to a rich woman, to increase his wealth. However, things change, when he falls in love with an environmental activist, who files a suit against his company.

title: Ugram
desc: Shiva, a reckless CI officer, often lands himself in trouble. However, his impulsive actions take a dark turn when his family goes missing from a hospital after an accident.

title: DD Returns
desc: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.
